description: Legal document in Hebrew. Very faded. Dated, but only the number 4 or 40 is readily legible. The hand looks late and/or Sefaradi-influenced. Mentions a financial loss (ההפסד שהפסיד...). Signed: Yeshaʿya b. Ḥiyya; [...] b. ʿOvadya; Yosef Seruji; Shelomo al-Maghribī.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
